chapter_goal: Connect analytic cycles to cohomology classes of type (k,k), and frame the Hodge conjecture as a visibility problem.
checks: cycle class lands on diagonal bidegrees
correspondence matrix composition is associative in a toy model
lab: Compose two toy correspondences and inspect how a Hodge class moves through the bidegree grid.
library_routes: Matplotlib for Hodge diamonds and cycle arrows
pitfalls: assuming every rational Hodge class is known to come from a cycle
proof_moves: associate a cohomology class to an analytic cycle
prove type constraints using currents or resolutions
visual_focus: A Hodge diamond with the (k,k) diagonal highlighted shows where cycle classes can land.
